title: Grayscale files S-1 for first US Worldcoin ETF
summary: The filing expands Grayscale’s growing lineup of crypto-related exchange-traded products outside of Bitcoin and Ether.

title: Celsius co-founders Leon, Goldstein to pay FTC over $6M
summary: The settlements add to former Celsius CEO Alex Mashinsky’s $10 million FTC settlement in April.

title: SBI Funds Rises 8.5% in Debut After $1 Billion India IPO
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. shares rose 8.5% in their Mumbai debut Tuesday after investors piled into the company’s $1 billion initial public offering, making it one of India’s most heavily subscribed billion-dollar share sales.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 21
summary: Brent oil slipped after surging almost 6% over the previous two sessions, as traders weighed continued hostilities between the US and Iran against efforts to broker a new ceasefire.

title: Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
summary:

Bitcoin Miner Hut 8 Shares Jump on $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Deal
Bitcoin miner Hut 8 has said it signed a second 15-year lease ​worth $9.8 billion for its AI data center.

title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
summary: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
summary: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

title: SEC charges Florida man and company in alleged $22 million crypto mining fraud scheme
summary: The defendants allegedly raised $22 million from more than 380 investors through a fraudulent crypto asset mining scheme.

title: Trump agrees to ethics provision as crypto bill inches closer to Senate vote
summary: President Trump has agreed to ethics language — potentially moving the ball forward to getting crypto legislation passed into law.

title: China weighs tighter export controls on AI models and chips
summary: Beijing consults companies on ways to stop west acquiring its advanced technologies and star start-ups

title: AI is becoming a geopolitical weapon, warns EU digital chief
summary: Europe needs to avoid relying on an unpredictable Washington for strategic capabilities, says Henna Virkkunen
